input.title: Consolidated Budget and Infrastructure Omnibus Act
input.official_summary: A broad appropriations and infrastructure package funding transportation, energy, water systems, and emergency resilience grants across multiple agencies.

text_sections.heading: Section 101. Transportation Funding
text_sections.text: Appropriates funds for rail modernization, bridge repair, and transit expansion with a five-year authorization period.

text_sections.heading: Section 201. Grid Reliability
text_sections.text: Creates grants for regional transmission upgrades and grid hardening projects managed by the Department of Energy.
